falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug would be invalidated, as that bottom formation held above 5,100; a break to 4,800 would indicate a much deeper structural break than the August 2024 consolidation, proving this is not a similar bottoming pattern but rather a breakdown into a new bear phase

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 40 suggests controlled fear/pessimism; sustained VIX above 35 would indicate panic-level dislocation inconsistent with a bottoming pattern and would signal capitulation rather than the measured bottom formation implied by the pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further to -75bps or more negative
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A deepening inversion would signal escalating recession probability that contradicts a bottoming scenario; the August 2024 bottom occurred with spread normalization beginning, so further inversion would prove this environment is fundamentally different and more dangerous than the matched pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
